judgments.comparative_verdict: Comparable overall, with Report 1 slightly stronger for correctly calling to fully remove the shadow-scoring sink and legacy billing secret and for explicitly demanding manual migration confirmation, where Report 2 softens those into edit/verify recommendations.

report_1.evidence: File `infra/prod/app.auto.tfvars` is a byte-for-byte copy of `infra/staging/app.auto.tfvars`. ... **Line 6 `SHADOW_SCORING_SINK = "s3://medislot-shadow/staging/observations/"`** ... **Remove this line entirely** ... **Line 7 `LEGACY_BILLING_SECRET_ARN = "arn:synthetic:secrets:legacy-billing-key"`** ... **Remove** unless prod genuinely still needs it

report_2.evidence: **`infra/prod/app.auto.tfvars:2` `ENABLE_DEBUG_TOOLBAR = "true"`** — the debug toolbar (backend/config.py:8) must not be on in production; change to `"false"`. ... **`infra/prod/app.auto.tfvars:4` `PRESET_ADMIN_ACCOUNTS = "qa@example.com:superadmin"`** — a preset QA superadmin backdoor account (config.py:10). Remove it entirely for prod (empty value).

report_1.evidence: The URL is baked in at build time. ... the string `https://staging-api.example.com` is hard-inlined into the JS bundle — there is no runtime override. ... **`deploy-prod` deploys `${{ needs.build-frontend.outputs.digest }}` — the exact same already-built digest** ... the production frontend ships pointing at the **staging** API ... the fix is a separate prod build (`--mode production` with a `.env.production` set to the real prod API URL)

report_2.evidence: builds the frontend with `npx vite build --mode staging` — **always staging mode**, for both the staging and prod deploys. ... That value is baked into the JS bundle. ... the **same digest** is shipped to prod ... So the production frontend would call `https://staging-api.example.com`. ... A prod env file (or build arg) plus a per-environment build/bundle is required.

report_1.evidence: The runbook (`docs/prod-runbook.md`...) claims "Database migrations are applied automatically during deploy," but there is **no migration step** in the workflow ... This must be confirmed/handled manually per the first-apply trap — don't trust the stale runbook.

report_2.evidence: **DB migrations aren't in the pipeline.** `docs/prod-runbook.md` claims "migrations are applied automatically during deploy," but `deploy.yml` has no migration step ... The runbook is stale ("last updated 3 months ago").

report_1.evidence: **Production (as written, broken):** `infra/prod/main.tf:3` **still** sets `oidc_sub_condition = "repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:staging"` — copied verbatim. ... It must be changed to `repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:production`.

report_2.evidence: **Production:** `infra/prod/main.tf:3` **also** sets `oidc_sub_condition = "…:environment:staging"` (unchanged from the copy). ... It must be changed to `repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:production`.
